name: The Practice Grounds
about: The Practice Grounds is an indoor golf practice and training facility focused on skill development and coaching. It offers a range of programs for adults, juniors, and competitive players, including group classes, individual coaching, and practice sessions. The facility is designed with technology and instruction as its core pillars, providing a structured environment for learning and improvement.
why_golfers_like_it: PGA and LPGA certified coaches provide professional instruction
Structured youth development pathways for junior golfers
Focus on skill-building with year-round practice opportunities

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you should bring your own clubs for practice sessions and coaching.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No outside food or drinks are permitted, as the facility does not have a kitchen or bar.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: This information is not specified on the website, as the facility is primarily focused on practice and coaching rather than simulator play.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, The Practice Grounds offers specialized programs for various age groups, including Tot (ages 3-4), Spark (ages 5-13), and Junior Select (competitive, ages 11+).
